lanInfo: Devices with LAN mode enabled in the Govee Home app are discovered automatically. This provides the fastest control (~100ms).
cloudInfo: Enter your Govee API key to enable device names, scenes and segment control. Get your key in the Govee Home app under Account > Settings > About Us > Apply for API Key.
mqttInfo: Enter your Govee account credentials to enable real-time status updates via MQTT. Without this, status is only updated on request.
aboutInfo: This adapter is free and open source. If you find it useful, consider supporting the development.
networkInterfaceTooltip: Select the network interface for LAN device discovery. Leave empty to use all interfaces (recommended for most setups).
wizardInfo: For LED strips that have been cut shorter than their factory length, use this wizard to identify which segments are physically present. Select the strip, click Start, then answer Yes/No for each segment that lights up.
wizardHelp: After each Start or answer, the selected segment flashes bright white while all others stay dark. Only one wizard can run at a time. The session auto-aborts after 5 minutes of inactivity. The result is stored in segments.manual_mode and segments.manual_list and can be edited manually (e.g. '0-9' for the first 10 of 15 segments, or '0-8,10-14' to skip segment 9).
